title: The Jessamine.
content:
EDDIE TO JESSIE.


    There are many flowers famous for fragrance and hue,
    Sweet Roses and Lilies, Geraniums too;
    And though decked in gay colors they look very fine,
    They are not to my fancy like sweet Jessie mine.
meaning:
"The Jessamine." is a quintessential example of Mary Ann H. T. Bigelow's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
